Operation 'deleteDocument' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original description is repetitive and lacks essential context. Improved version clarifies the permanent nature of deletion, specifies what gets deleted (document and extracted data), mentions authentication requirement, warns about irreversibility, and explains the response. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and when it's appropriate to use.

data.summary_suggestion: Permanently delete a document and its data
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a document from the system by its ID. This operation deletes the document record and all associated extracted data. Requires authentication. This action cannot be undone. Returns a success confirmation upon deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description is repetitive and lacks essential context. Improved version clarifies the permanent nature of deletion, specifies what gets deleted (document and extracted data), mentions authentication requirement, warns about irreversibility, and explains the response. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and when it's appropriate to use.

message: Operation 'getExtractorExtractedData' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description is repetitive and lacks critical details. Improved version clarifies that results are paginated (important for large datasets), specifies the return type (ExtractedData objects), mentions parameter support for filtering/pagination, and notes authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand how to handle potentially large result sets and what parameters are available.

data.current_summary: Get all extracted data for an extractor
data.current_description: Get all extracted data for an extractor
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all extracted data results associated with a specific extractor. Returns a paginated collection of ExtractedData objects for all documents processed by the extractor. Supports filtering and pagination parameters to manage large result sets. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description is repetitive and lacks critical details. Improved version clarifies that results are paginated (important for large datasets), specifies the return type (ExtractedData objects), mentions parameter support for filtering/pagination, and notes authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand how to handle potentially large result sets and what parameters are available.

Original description lacks details about input format, return value, and processing workflow. data.current_description: Upload a document file for extraction processing.
data.summary_suggestion: Upload a document file for extraction
data.description_suggestion: Uploads a document file to initiate extraction processing. Accepts multipart form data with the document file. Returns a Document object with upload status and document ID. The document is queued for processing by the specified or default extractor.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks details about input format, return value, and processing workflow. Enhanced version clarifies multipart upload format, return structure, and that the document enters a processing queue, enabling AI agents to understand the full operation flow.

data.current_description: Upload a base64-encoded document for extraction.
